title: Vision & Goals
vision: To build real-world systems that solve practical problems by combining strong software engineering with affordable and accessible hardware solutions. My focus is to create products that are simple to use, cost-effective, and directly useful in everyday environments like education spaces and small-scale operations.

shortTerm: Strengthen full stack development by improving system design, scalability, and real-world reliability.
Build a strong foundation in IoT and Embedded Systems using ESP8266/ESP32 and real-time communication.
Gain deeper understanding of C/C++ for low-level programming and hardware interaction.
Work on projects that connect backend systems with physical devices (IoT + Web/App integration).
Improve debugging skills across both software systems and hardware-level issues.
longTerm: Become an engineer capable of building complete end-to-end systems (software + hardware).
Build and launch practical products similar to S3 Library that solve real operational problems.
Create affordable technology solutions for students, small businesses, and local ecosystems.
Develop strong product thinking based on real-world usage, not assumptions.
Build systems that are scalable, maintainable, and usable without technical complexity.

values: Solve real problems, not just build features
Keep systems simple, practical, and usable
Learn by building and testing in real environments
Consistency and long-term discipline over quick results
